parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{"You are an Executive Assistant for email triage. Return strict JSON with keys: is_important (boolean), is_bill (boolean), category (string), reason (string), summary (string), suggested_action (string). Rules: if force_important is true, set is_important=true. If bill_detected is true, set is_bill=true and category='bill'. Context: " + JSON.stringify({from: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["sender_email"], domain: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["sender_domain"], subject: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["subject_normalized"], body: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["body_normalized"], force_important: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["force_important"], bill_detected: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["bill_detected"], important_list_match: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["important_list_match"], rule_reason: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["rule_reason"]})}}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { let ai = {}; try { ai = JSON.parse($node['AI Triage (Local Ollama)'].json['response'] || $node['AI Triage (Local Ollama)'].json['thinking'] || '{}'); } catch (e) {} return JSON.stringify({ parent: { data_source_id: ($env['NOTION_DATA_SOURCE_ID'] || '2c91d511-87a6-805c-ab38-000b18d92545') }, properties: { Name: { title: [{ text: { content: ((($node['Gmail Trigger'].json['subject'] || $node['Gmail Trigger'].json['Subject'] || 'No Subject') + ' [INVESTOR]').substring(0, 100)) } }] }, Sender: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (($node['Gmail Trigger'].json['From'] || $node['Gmail Trigger'].json['from'] || $node['Gmail Trigger'].json['sender'] || $node['Gmail Trigger'].json['email'] || '').substring(0, 100)) } }] }, 'Sender Domain': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['sender_domain'] || '').substring(0, 100)) } }] }, 'Core Request': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((ai.summary || 'AI triage failed').substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, 'Importance Reason': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['rule_reason'] || ai.reason || '')).substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, Category: { select: { name: ($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['bill_detected'] ? 'Bill' : (ai.category || 'Important')) } }, 'Reply Draft': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((ai.suggested_action || '').substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, Status: { select: { name: 'Not Started' } }, 'Original Link': { url: $node['Gmail Trigger'].json['webViewLink'] || $node['Gmail Trigger'].json['webLink'] || ('https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox/' + ($node['Gmail Trigger'].json['id'] || '')) } } }); })() }}

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: ={{"New important email triaged from Gmail. From: " + $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["sender_email"] + ". Subject: " + $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["subject_normalized"] + ". Category: " + ($node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["bill_detected"] ? "Bill" : (JSON.parse($node["AI Triage (Local Ollama)"].json["response"]).category || "Important")) + ". Summary: " + JSON.parse($node["AI Triage (Local Ollama)"].json["response"]).summary + ". This has been added to Notion. Notify me proactively and offer to draft a reply if needed."}}
